code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> Opened: Issue created
    
    Opened --> Triage: Auto-added to project
    
    Triage --> Todo: Accepted & prioritized
    Triage --> Closed: Rejected / Duplicate
    Triage --> NeedsInfo: More information needed
    
    NeedsInfo --> Triage: Information provided
    NeedsInfo --> Closed: No response
    
    Todo --> InProgress: Work started
    
    InProgress --> InReview: PR opened
    InProgress --> Blocked: Dependencies / Issues
    InProgress --> Todo: Paused / Deprioritized
    
    Blocked --> InProgress: Unblocked
    Blocked --> Todo: Alternative approach
    
    InReview --> InProgress: Changes requested
    InReview --> Done: PR merged
    
    Done --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: Issue closed
    Closed --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
    
    note right of Opened
        Labels applied:
        - Type (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
        - Area (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    end note
    
    note right of Triage
        Platform/Owner reviews:
        - Is it valid?
        - What's the priority?
        - Who should work on it?
    end note
    
    note right of Todo
        Work is planned:
        - Priority: P0-P3
        - Effort: XS-XL
        - Owner Team assigned
    end note
    
    note right of InProgress
        Active development:
        - Branch created
        - Commits happening
        - Regular updates
    end note
    
    note right of InReview
        PR review:
        - CODEOWNERS review
        - CI checks passing
        - Approvals required
    end note
    
    note right of Done
        Completed:
        - PR merged
        - Changes deployed
        - Issue auto-closed
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为IoT工业场景设计一个Issue生命周期状态机。起点是ActuatorController创建Issue，进入Opened状态。
Opened之后直接到Triage吗？还是说有自动流转的逻辑？
对，Opened通过"Auto-added to project"自动流转到Triage。Triage阶段平台负责人要评审有效性、优先级和指派。
好的，Triage我画了三个出口：Accepted到Todo，Rejected直接Closed，还有需要补充信息的NeedsInfo分支。
Todo状态要体现计划性，包含P0-P3优先级、XS-XL工作量评估和Owner Team指派。然后进入InProgress时要有开发活动标记。
InProgress我看到有Blocked分支，这个和Paused回Todo有什么区别？
Blocked是外部依赖导致的阻塞，解决后回到InProgress；Paused是主动降级，走Alternative approach回Todo。另外Blocked也可以转Alternative approach。
InReview我加了CODEOWNERS评审和CI检查，出口是Changes requested回InProgress，或者PR merged到Done。
Done之后应该指向EdgeNode，不是回到ActuatorController。Closed才是回到ActuatorController形成闭环。另外Opened和Triage的Note要标注TelemetryStream类型和PLC_Logic区域。
已修正：Done流向EdgeNode表示Issue关闭，Closed回到ActuatorController。Note信息也已补充完整。
